transitions.name: request_deployment
transitions.description: Initiating deployment request for the environment.
transitions.start_state_description: The deployment is requested and pending processing.
transitions.end_state_description: The deployment is currently in progress.

process.name: process_deployment_request
process.description: Processes the deployment request and starts the deployment.

transitions.name: deployment_success
transitions.end_state_description: The deployment has been completed successfully.

process.name: handle_success
process.description: Handles actions to perform on successful deployment.

process.name: handle_failure
process.description: Handles actions to perform on failed deployment.

transitions.name: request_user_app_deployment
transitions.description: Initiating deployment request for user application.
transitions.start_state_description: The user application deployment is requested and pending processing.
transitions.end_state_description: The user application deployment is currently in progress.

process.name: process_user_app_deployment_request
process.description: Processes the user application deployment request and starts the deployment.

transitions.name: user_app_deployment_success
transitions.start_state_description: The user application deployment is ongoing.
transitions.end_state_description: The user application deployment has been completed successfully.

process.name: handle_user_app_success
process.description: Handles actions to perform on successful user application deployment.

transitions.name: user_app_deployment_failure
transitions.start_state_description: The user application deployment is ongoing.
transitions.end_state_description: The user application deployment has failed.

process.name: handle_user_app_failure
process.description: Handles actions to perform on failed user application deployment.
